message:
🌱 Add the-update-framework-tuf-: Automated release builds mission (#750)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "the-update-framework-tuf-1550-automated-release-builds",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "the-update-framework-tuf-: Automated release builds",
+    "description": "Automated release builds. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current the-update-framework-tuf- deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your the-update-framework-tuf- version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=the-update-framework-tuf-\nhelm list -n the-update-framework-tuf- 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working the-update-framework-tuf- installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the-update-framework-tuf- configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant the-update-framework-tuf- configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=the-update-framework-tuf-\nkubectl get configmap -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=the-update-framework-tuf-\n```\n**Description of issue or feature request**:\n\nAutomate releases to reduce potential for human error and protect against developer machine compromise."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Automated release builds",
+        "description": "This PR adds a workflow with two jobs to\n\n. The release job waits for the build job and uses a custom release environment, which can be configured to require review.\n\nTo share the build artifacts between the jobs and to make them available for intermediate review, we use [actions/upload-artifact](https://github.com/actions/upload-artifact) (in build) and [actions/download-artifact](https://github.com/actions/download-artifact) (in release) (also see [GitHub\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n the-update-framework-tuf- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=the-update-framework-tuf-\nkubectl get events -n the-update-framework-tuf- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Automated release builds\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR adds a workflow with two jobs to\n\n. The release job waits for the build job and uses a custom release environment, which can be configured to require review.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
